scene.description: A photorealistic dusk blue-hour exterior of the completed Anna's Farm Site Two common-space entry. The ten solar path lights along the straight run are fully glowing warm 2700K amber, casting a rhythmic line of soft light pools across the tan decomposed granite. The 3+1 boulder composition is rim-lit by the nearest fixtures; flagstone clusters catch faint specular highlights. Cobalt blue sky with a faint warm horizon band. Subtle ambient fill from a distant streetlamp off-frame.
scene.location: Lafayette, Colorado, Boulder County (40.0004 N, -105.110 W)

materials.type: tan decomposed granite, cool blue-shadowed with warm pools near lights
rust rip-rap accent line, reading dark against warm pools
buff Lyons sandstone, 3 tons, catching subtle specular highlights
matte-black solar path lights at full warm 2700K glow, rhythmic along long axis, subtle bloom

lighting.source: ambient blue-hour skylight plus ten warm practical path lights
lighting.direction: omnidirectional blue fill plus rhythmic warm pools
lighting.practical_lights: full warm glow, gentle falloff, overlapping light pools across granite

camera.framing: same 3/4 angle as site2_03_hero_golden, along the long axis, slightly tighter on the light rhythm

composition.foreground: first warm light pool and path-light fixture
composition.midground: rhythm of glowing lights leading to hero cluster
composition.background: silhouetted stucco wall against cobalt sky
